message.content:
Search the entire repository for:

1. ALL .npmrc files - any directory, show their full contents
2. The UseOnePortal method in OnePortalApplicationBuilderExtension.cs (in libraries/LibOnePortal/) - read the entire file, especially around line 180 where SPA proxy configuration happens
3. Any configuration related to "UseProxyToSpaDevelopmentServer", "UseSpa", "SpaRoot", "SpaProxyServerUrl" across the entire codebase
4. Any reference to "create-react-app" or "react-scripts" in the codebase
5. Any reference to "always-auth" in any config file
6. The OnePortalServiceSPA class - find and read it completely to understand how it sets up the SPA dev server

Be very thorough - read the full files, not just snippets.

content.text: I'll search the repository thoroughly for all these items. Let me start with multiple searches in parallel.
